nl_query: For each faculty member, show their name, department, total scripts assigned as primary evaluator, total scripts submitted, total honorarium approved, and the average marks they awarded per script.
failed_sql:
SELECT fc.name AS faculty_name, au.name AS academic_unit, COUNT(DISTINCT sa.id) AS total_scripts_assigned, COUNT(DISTINCT ea.id) AS total_scripts_submitted, SUM(hs.final_amount) AS total_honorarium_approved, AVG(em.marks_awarded) AS average_marks_awarded_per_script
FROM   faculty_cache fc
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.faculty_cache_id = fc.id
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = sa.course_id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.assignment_id = sa.id
JOIN   honorarium_summary hs ON hs.faculty_cache_id = fc.id AND hs.role_in_board = 'EVALUATOR'
JOIN   evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = ea.id
WHERE  ea.is_active = TRUE
GROUP  BY fc.name, au.name
ORDER  BY total_scripts_assigned DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): script_assignment.course_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
